archetypes.name: Two-Way Machine
archetypes.description: Elite on both ends. No glaring weakness. Blue-blood tournament profile.

archetypes.name: Offensive Juggernaut
archetypes.description: Historically elite offense scoring from everywhere. Defense is secondary.

archetypes.name: Defensive Fortress
archetypes.description: Suffocating defense with rim protection and arc lockdown. Every game is a grind.

archetypes.name: Gunslinger
archetypes.description: High 3-point volume AND gets to the line relentlessly. Forces impossible defensive choices.

archetypes.name: Sniper System
archetypes.description: Lives and dies by the 3. High volume and efficiency from deep.

archetypes.name: Offensive Engine
archetypes.description: Efficient offense without a dominant identity. Scores well but defense is a question mark.

archetypes.name: Foul-Line Bully
archetypes.description: Gets to the line relentlessly. Physical, paint-dominant, aggressive style.

archetypes.name: System Operator
archetypes.description: Wins through execution — low turnovers, disciplined half-court, hard to put away.
